---
title: "Unit 6: Quadratic Equations"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit6-quadratics')
from Quadratics import generate
from collections import defaultdict

# ── CONFIGURATION ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# QMD controls: which types, seed, show_solutions
# Python controls: count per type, layout, cols
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
data = generate(
    types=[
        # LT1 — Factorising simple (a=1)
        "factorise_simple",
        "factorise_negative_c",
        "factorise_both_negative",
        # LT2 — Factorising harder (a≠1)
        "factorise_hard",
        "factorise_hard_negative",
        # LT3 — Special forms
        "diff_two_squares",
        "perfect_square",
        # LT4 — Solve by factorising
        "solve_simple",
        "solve_hard",
        "solve_special",
        # LT5 — Quadratic formula
        "formula_integer",
        "formula_surd",
        "formula_non_real",
        # LT6 — Completing the square
        "complete_square_form",
        "complete_square_nonmonic",
        "complete_square_solve",
        "complete_square_nonmonic_solve",
        # LT7 — Word problems
        "word_area",
        "word_consecutive",
        "word_projectile",
        # LT8 — Geometry
        "geo_rectangle",
        "geo_right_triangle",
        # LT5 ext — Discriminant
        "discriminant_nature",
        "discriminant_find_k",
        # LT7 ext — more integer problems
        "word_even_integers",
        "word_odd_integers",
        # LT9 — Forming equations from roots
        "roots_to_equation",
        "roots_symmetric",
        # LT8 ext — more geometry
        "geo_right_triangle_area",
        "geo_L_shape",
        "geo_cuboid_surface",
        "geo_cuboid_volume",
        # LT10 — Algebraic fraction equations
        "frac_equation_simple",
        "frac_equation_diff",
        # LT11 — Disguised quadratics
        "disguised_biquadratic",
        "disguised_linear_sub",
        # LT12 — Surd equations
        "surd_simple",
        "surd_difference",
        # LT13 — Indices → quadratic
        "indices_quadratic",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    show_solutions = True,
)

grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in data["_exercises_qmd"]:
    grouped[ex["difficulty"]].append(ex)
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Quadratics-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}

## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Quadratics-Formulas.qmd >}}

## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge

```{=html}


<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">

<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/quadratic-equat-55a860/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title:    "Quadratic Equations",
  unit:     "Unit 6 · Quadratic Equations",
  pyPath:   "Quadratics.py",
  template: "word",
  // Equation types only — no word/geo in worksheet
  types: [
    "factorise_simple",
    "factorise_negative_c",
    "factorise_hard",
    "diff_two_squares",
    "solve_simple",
    "solve_hard",
    "formula_integer",
    "formula_surd",
    "complete_square_form",
    "complete_square_solve"
  ]
};
</script>
```
